basic_details.job_title: ISI Project Linked Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Linked Person Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Usual relaxation as per Government of India rules will be applicable. Age relaxation may be given to outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class MA in Linguistics/Corpus Linguistics/Cognitive Linguistics/Computational Linguistics, Experience in management of multiword units in lexical databases and corpora, Working knowledge in Excel and MS Office, Experience in dictionary-making software, Knowledge of thematic multiword classification, Presentation in conferences/publication in journals
qualification.details: 1st Class MA in Linguistics/Corpus Linguistics/Cognitive Linguistics/Computational Linguistics with good knowledge about multiword units and Experience in management of multiword units in lexical databases and corpora. Working knowledge in Excel and MS Office. Experience in dictionary-making software. Knowledge of thematic multiword classification. Presentation in conferences/publication in journals.

selection_process: Written/Programming Test (if required) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ISI Project Linked Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ISI Project Linked Person position is 15-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Linked Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st Class MA in Linguistics, Corpus Linguistics, Cognitive Linguistics, or Computational Linguistics, along with relevant experience in lexical databases and corpora management.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Linked Person position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Linked Person post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Linked Person post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ISI Project Linked Person job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Linked Person role?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a Written/Programming Test (if required), followed by an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Project Linked Person at the Indian Statistical Institute is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. Does ISI offer any age relaxation for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, usual relaxation as per Government of India rules will be applicable. Age relaxation may also be given to outstanding candidates or those with relevant experience.
